titleStmt.title: SII 9.567: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 567. (A.R. No. 72 of 1912.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE PRAKARA OF THE LAKSHMIDEVI TEMPLE AT GORREPALLE, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1456, Jaya, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 8, Kṛishṇajayantī, corresponding to A.D. 1534 August 1, Saturday (not verifiabie), in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that, at the suggestion of Vīrapaṇṇayya of Penugoṇḍe, Timmarasa, son of Bhaṇḍārada Apparasa of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Kātyāyana-sūtra and Śukla-Yajuśśākhā, made a gift of the village Muttakadahaḷḷi, surnamed Mahālakshmīpura, for the service of the goddess Mahālakshmīdēvī at Haruhe-Lakkhaṇāpura in Roddanāḍu, a sub-division of Penugoṇḍe-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . vaṁdāmahē mahālakṣmīṁ vaṁdāruvaradāyinīṁ . lakhkhaṇāpuravikhyāta puṇya
tīrthanivāsinīṁ . muddāṁbāvaralakkiseṭṭitanayaśrīvīrapaṇṇāhvayakṣmābhartrā vara (ra)lakhka
ṇāpuramahālakṣmyāḥ susampāditaṁ . naivēdyādisamṛddhayē pratidinaṁ yadgrāmasīmādikaṁ
tatsarvaṁ pravilikhyatē sakalavikhyātyai śilāśāsanē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśāli
vāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1456 neya jayasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa
ba 8 kruṣṇajayaṁtīpu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīacutadēvamahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁgaivuttaṁ yira
lū . bhāradvājagōtrada kātyāyanasūtrada śuklayajuśyākheya bhaṁ
ḍārada Apparsara kumāra tiṁmarsaru I Acutadēvamahārāyaru tamage
māgaṇināyakatanakke pālisida penugoṁḍerājya rodanāḍa haruhe sthaḷadoḷagaṇa . viṭha
lāpurada Agrahārakke mūḍalu haruhesthaḷada boṁmagoṁḍanaha
ḷige teṁkalu gora
vanahaḷḷige paḍuvalu modeyagā . make baḍagalāda catusīmāsahitavāda nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣā
ṇa Akṣīṇāgāmi sidha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyadoḍane kūḍida muttakadahaḷige prati
nāmavāda mahālakṣmīpuraveṁba sarvamānyada grāmavanū penugoṁḍe vīrappaṁṇaṁyanavaru bōdhi
salāgi haruhe lakhaṇāpurada mahālakṣmīdēvarige dhūpa dīpa Amṛtapaḍi naivēdya nṛtya gīta vādya muṁ
tāda vaibhavaṁgaḷige ta(ṁ)mma svāmi Accutadēvamahārāyarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu
sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyi Āgi sarvamānyavāgi dhārane
radu koṭṭa muttakadahaḷḷi grāmada dharmaśāsanada prati . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ parada
ttānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 9.567 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
